query:
INSERT INTO incidents (
            title, summary, severity, confidence, status,
            location, geohash,
            event_ids, event_types,
            source_count, source_diversity,
            first_event_at, last_event_at
        ) VALUES (
            $1, $2, $3, $4, 'OPEN',
            ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint($5, $6), 4326), $7,
            $8, $9,
            $10, $11,
            $12, $13
        )
        RETURNING id
